calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-31-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Plaintiff/Respondent Robert Schiller appears for Jones Schiller & Company LLP.
Defendant/Appellant Linda O'Connor appears with counsel Yosef Peretz.

The cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Robert Schiller testifies on behalf of Jones Schiller & Company LLP.
The following Exhibits are introduced by Plaintiff/Respondent and retained.
#1- Statement of charges
#2- August 29, 2015 Invoice.

Defendant testifies through her counsel.
The following Exhibits are introduced by Defendant/Appellant and retained.
#1- Email string
#2- December 9, 2013 Jones Schiller & Co. Invoice

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Pro Tem: David H. Fleisig; Clerk: Craig Blackstone; not reported (D. 525).
